title: かしわ記念の後に・歌いませんけど

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even without Hokko Tarumae, the race is a huge
crowd-pleaser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the race is over, a number of Copano
Rickey's friends come running over.
Rickeeey!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah! Is that...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That was a fantastic race! We were cheering you
on like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally! You looked so powerful out there, I
feel like you really made a name for yourself!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Kita, Dia! You two came to watch me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! That was some real fleet footwork!
Today turned out to be a real Rickey festival!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well? Do you feel the urge to break out into song
right here on the racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you mean outside the winning concert?! I
can't sing here! People don't usually do that,
right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I dunno. I think they'd do it if they had a little
enka spirit in them.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know I would if I ever get the chance! Dad would
probably love it too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Haha! Oh, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Kita really loves her dad, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I guess I sort of ran with a similar feeling today,
though.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yes! Today is a special day for my own dad.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's his birthday! ☆ And for this special occasion, I
figured I could bloom on the track, like a bouquet
of flowers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's why Copano Rickey ran with extra
force today.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, I ran as best as I could. It seems like the
race generated the usual excitement, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The force fields felt a little off. Feng shui never
lies.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The qi in the direction of Kan wasn't surging like
the rest.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The direction north, where Tomakomai is.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Without Tarumae, the people of Tomakomai
won't feel as much excitement.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Please, Tarumae. Come back soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, about my next race. Have we set a
goal yet?
choice_data_list:
Yeah, I'm thinking of a race in which Tarumae is
guaranteed to compete.

Yeah, I'm thinking of a race in which Tarumae is
guaranteed to compete.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Guaranteed? Which is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the biggest races in June, at the Oi
Racecourse...
choice_data_list: I think she'll be aiming for the Teio Sho.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Teio Sho... You're right. There's no way she
won't be entering.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This time, this race... We'll do it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's fans are definitely looking
forward to a showdown with Hokko Tarumae. It's
the perfect chance to demonstrate the power of
feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae, I'll be taking on the Teio Sho. And
surely...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Surely, you'll be doing the same. For a chance to
compete with me once again!
